tools.name: register_asset
tools.description: Register an ICT asset (application, database, server, etc.) — Art. 8.

tools.name: register_function
tools.description: Register an ICT-supported business function — Art. 8.

tools.name: map_dependency
tools.description: Create a dependency link between two entities.

tools.name: dependency_graph
tools.description: Get dependency tree for an entity — upstream/downstream.

tools.name: blast_radius
tools.description: Calculate blast radius — what breaks if this entity fails.

tools.name: spof_analysis
tools.description: Detect Single Points of Failure without redundancy.

tools.name: criticality_score
tools.description: Calculate criticality score based on dependencies, classification, redundancy.

tools.name: asset_inventory
tools.description: Full ICT asset inventory with classification and filters.

tools.name: impact_simulation
tools.description: Simulate outage — cascade impact of entity failure.
